title: DHCP, DNS, IPv6 Services, and Time · Incident Case: Net Dhcp Relay
summary: Implement redundant address, name, and time services for clients, infrastructure, and secure operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net dhcp relay increment in a validated core network-services design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use DHCP relay or IP helper across routed boundaries and trace discover, offer, request, and acknowledgment evidence.
Configure DHCP scopes, leases, reservations, exclusions, gateways, DNS options, and pool capacity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
